zh.Bramber Castle, Sussex, England: 英國素可布拉波 卡素
zh.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland於大約1051年出生在英國波藍德斯凱爾頓時，他的父親Robert de Bruis39歲，母親Mrs. Robert de Bruis39歲。他和Emma De Brittany至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1143年在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素享年93歲。

zh-hans.Bramber Castle, Sussex, England: 英国素可布拉波 卡素
zh-hans.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland于大约1051年出生在英国波藍德斯凱爾頓时，他的父亲Robert de Bruis39岁，母亲Mrs. Robert de Bruis39岁。他和Emma De Brittany至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1143年在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (also Van der Kruis and Van de Kruis): topographic name for someone who lived by a crossing or by a place of execution, from Dutch kruis ‘cross’.
German: nickname meaning ‘crab’, from Middle High German kruiz.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland was born about 1051, in Skelton, Cumberland, England, his father, Robert de Bruis, was 39 and his mother, Mrs. Robert de Bruis, was 39. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Emma De Brittany. He died in 1143, in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland est né environ 1051, à Skelton, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Bruis, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert de Bruis, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Emma De Brittany. Il est décédé en 1143, à Skelton Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland um 1051 in Skelton, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Bruis 39 und seine Mutter Mrs. Robert de Bruis 39. Er hatte mit Emma De Brittany mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1143 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland è nato il circa 1051 nel Skelton, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Robert de Bruis, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Robert de Bruis, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Emma De Brittany. Morì nel 1143, nel Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Clevelandが約1051年にイギリスクウンバーランドスケルトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Bruisは39歳，母Mrs. Robert de Bruisは39歳であった。彼はEmma De Brittanyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1143年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストルで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland(이)가 대략 1051년 영국 c벌랜드 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Bruis(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Robert de Bruis(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Emma De Brittany(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1143년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴 카스틀에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland nasceu aproximadamente 1051, em Skelton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Bruis, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert de Bruis, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Emma De Brittany. Ele faleceu em 1143, em Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland родился около 1051 г. в местности скелтон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Bruis было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert de Bruis, 39. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Emma De Brittany. Он умер в 1143 г. в местности скелтон кастл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Bruis Baron of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland nació aproximadamente 1051, en Skelton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Bruis, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert de Bruis, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Emma De Brittany. Murió en 1143, en Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años.
